catalog_meta.title: uXu Grateful Dead Tablature & Lyric Index

gd-dark-star.title: Dark Star
structure: [A] Dark star crashes, pouring its [G] light into ashes
[A] Reason tatters, the forces [G] tear loose from the axis
[A] Searchlight casting for faults in the [G] clouds of delusion
[A] Shall we go, you and I while we [G] can
[A] Through the transitive nightfall of [G] diamonds

gd-franklins-tower.title: Franklin's Tower
structure: [D] Your eyes looked from your [G] mother's face
[A] Wildflower seed on the [G] sand and stone
[D] May the four winds blow you [G] safely home
